case_title: CORTES, ELIZABETH vs. LEAL, EZRA HUGO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTES, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT LEAL, EZRA HUGO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-12-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-23-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-12-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-12-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY THE COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION. HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY RE: OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTES, ELIZABETH
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-12-1995, CONTINUED TO NOV-13-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
